title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Qualcomm India Global Group

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Qualcomm India Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Qualcomm India Global Group has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Noida office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Qualcomm India Global Group:
Qualcomm India Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Qualcomm India Global Group!
